notes: Bug confirmed: On file-upload page, after selecting 'My Favorite Music.csv' into Single file input, DevTools Console shows getDirtyState() returns '{}' (empty object) - form.dirty did not change. Initial state was also '{}'. This confirms issue #454: selecting a file with single file input does not change form.dirty to true. Verified via React Fiber state inspection in Console: dirty Proxy Target object remained empty after file selection. The subscription page's metadata display confirmed dirty tracking mechanism works (counters increment on text input changes).
